# SSLGetNumberEnabledCiphers(_:_:)

**Function**

Determines the number of cipher suites currently enabled.

## Declaration

```swift
func SSLGetNumberEnabledCiphers(_ context: SSLContext, _ numCiphers: UnsafeMutablePointer<Int>) -> OSStatus
```

## Parameters

- **context**: An SSL session context reference.
- **numCiphers**: On return, points to the number of enabled cipher suites.

## Return Value

A result code. See [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/secure-transport-result-codes].

## Discussion

You use the number of enabled cipher suites returned by this function when you call the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SSLGetEnabledCiphers(_:_:_:)] function to retrieve the list of currently enabled cipher suites.
